creator: george@highspeedrails.com
text:
when building a package via "make package-recursive clean" of the www/apache20 port, the start script in /usr/local/etc/rc.d/ is not included in the package. It is also left out of the package's packing list.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/www/apache20 && make package-recursive clean

now install the resulting package on another system and check if the file /usr/local/etc/rc.d/apache2 exists.
